parsed_output.justification: Mike claims to be the Troublemaker and describes the results of the card swap between Justin and Paul. However, the Troublemaker swaps cards without looking at them, meaning Mike could not possibly know who ended up with which role. This contradiction suggests Mike is lying about his role to deceive the group, making him the most likely Werewolf.

validation.justification: Mike claims to be the Troublemaker and describes the results of the card swap between Justin and Paul. However, the Troublemaker swaps cards without looking at them, meaning Mike could not possibly know who ended up with which role. This contradiction suggests Mike is lying about his role to deceive the group, making him the most likely Werewolf.
